Interface IRelationshipClass2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that get related object row pairs within a query filter specification.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C9C39723-40B6-454F-A7FF-A25491C72256")]
public interface IRelationshipClass2 : IRelationshipClass
